data.body:
PASS 1 review — G1G2 (edit-set / scope accuracy): CLEAN, no findings.

Verified every file/symbol the plan names resolves in-tree:
- `gate_dispatch.produce_plan_review_verdict` + `_attach_plan_review_metrics` — src/rebar/llm/workflow/gate_dispatch.py:46,121
- recorder per-step `duration_ms` on leaf + batch — src/rebar/llm/workflow/interpreter.py:388,489,502,530; threaded through `_step_record`/executor record — src/rebar/llm/workflow/executor.py:655,672
- `precheck` det-floor marker + `agent`/`batch` LLM tier — `_DET_STEP_IDS`/`_LLM_STEP_KINDS` at gate_dispatch.py:117-118
- finder `criteria_count` cost proxy — production_batch_runner.py:134 / runners.py:136, consumed at gate_dispatch.py:157
- `total_ms` measured around `run_workflow` — gate_dispatch.py:73,88
- sidecar top-level `metrics` lift (AC3) — plan_review/sidecar.py:141

Consumer enumeration: the only consumer of `coverage['metrics']` outside the workflow dir is the plan_review sidecar, which AC3 explicitly covers (lift + equality assertion). No unenumerated consumers found.

Scope classification: all hunks are REINSTATEMENT of a previously-existing behavior (db7b coverage['metrics']) regressed by B-RETIRE — in-scope, not out-of-scope creation. No hallucinated/missing edit targets.
